arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé would have stayed at PSG for his brother Ethan
arts.sum: In an interview with Canal+, Kylian Mbappé (25) has claimed that he would have extended his contract at Paris Saint-Germain if it would have helped his younger brother Ethan Mbappé…

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea Tipped to Pursue €100M-Rated PSG Transfer Target Next Summer
arts.sum: In October, Football Insider reported that Liverpool had entered the race to sign Palmeiras’ promising talent, Vitor Reis, though their primary focus remains to strengthen their central defense. The report also mentioned that Reis is eager to move to Europe, with ambitions of playing in the Champions League. arts.ttl: Man Utd Poised to Revisit Interest in €60M-Rated Liverpool, PSG-Linked Ace Amid Struggles at Barcelona
arts.sum: In October, SPORT reported that Manchester United, Chelsea, and Bayern Munich have all shown interest in Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong, with Paris Saint-Germain also monitoring his situation closely.
